title: cardia officinalis
intro: Cardia officinalis, also known as Sea Holly or Eryngium maritimum, is a coastal plant species native to Europe and North Africa. This plant has been utilized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects, to treat various health conditions such as edema and skin issues. The health benefits of Cardia officinalis include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion, making it a popular herbal remedy for digestive issues and skin problems. Cardia officinalis can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or infusion, often used in traditional medicine to alleviate symptoms and promote overall well-being.
